『ラスター』について

ラスターは
高速戦闘を得意とする後継クラスです。

装備可能な武器は
「ガンスラッシュ」のみですが
装備した武器の属性によって
戦い方が異なる3種のスタイルへ変化します。

「ザンディスタイル」 ※風・雷属性武器を装備
速度重視のスタイル。回避や範囲殲滅を得意とする。
「フォメルスタイル」 ※炎・闇属性武器を装備
攻撃重視のスタイル。頑強を備えた近接戦闘を得意とする。
「バーランスタイル」 ※氷・光属性武器を装備
防御重視のスタイル。ガードや遠距離攻撃を得意とする。

ラスターは今までのクラスとは
異なる点があります。

・サブクラスを設定できない
（クエストの受注条件にサブクラスの
　レベル制限がある場合はメインクラスの
　レベルを参照します）

・一部の潜在能力、スキルリングの効果が無効
（例：戦技昂魂、Ｒ／アタックアドバンス等）
・サポートパートナーは
　ラスターにクラス変更できません
Clase: Brillo

The Luster is a Scion Class that accels in high-speed combat.

While they are only capable of equipping Gunblades,
they can switch between three combat styles depending
on the element of the equipped weapon.

Zandi Style: A high-speed style activated when a wind or
lightning element weapon is equipped. Proficient in dodging and AoE attacks.
Fomel Style: An aggressive style activated when a fire or
dark element weapon is equipped. Proficient in close combat.
Baran Style: A defensive style activated when a ice or light
element weapon is equipped. Proficient in guarding and long range attacks.

The Luster is different from previous
classes in certain ways.

- Setting a subclass is not supported.
(For orders requiring a certain subclass level,
the player's main class level will be used instead.)

- Certain Potentials and Skill Ring effects will
not work
(Ex: Warrior's Spirit, R/Attack Advance, etc.)

- An Auxiliary cannot change his or her class to Luster

Hojas de armas brillantes

A Gunblade equipped by a Luster is known as a "Luster Gunblade."

Luster Gunblades are capable of attacking at both short and long distance by freely switching between the gun and sword pieces.

Many skills modify the weapon's attacks, so try learning skills that suit your combat style to expand the strategies available to you.

e Photon Arts using the gun.
Bring out the Luster's true power by making use of this versatility in combat.

Lusters know the skill "Luster Gunblade Focus" by default.

Press and hold an attack button to deplete the Focus Gauge and strengthen your attack.

The Focus Gauge will build up over time and as you attack enemies.

1. Enhanced Attack
-Press and hold Normal Attack Button.
The attack will have different effects depending on your current style.
Note: If this attack is triggered without depleting the Focus Gauge, its damage will be reduced.

2. Enhanced Shot
-Press and hold the Weapon Action button.
The Focus Gauge will deplete in accordance with how long the button is held. A powerful attack will be unleashed, depending on the style.
Note: This attack will not trigger if the Focus Gauge is below one segment.

3. Enhanced Arts
-Press and hold the Photon Arts button.
Consumes one Focus Gauge segment to unleash a different additional attack when a Photon Art is unleashed.
Note: If this attack is triggered without depleting the Focus Gauge, its damage will be reduced.
the Class Skill "Stationary Arts" has not been learned, Mobile Arts will be activated regardless of movement input.<c>

Style Purge
-Quickly press the Weapon Action button twice to unleash an explosive elemental attack that excels in PP recovery and filling the Focus Gauge. After use, all Style Effects will temporarily vanish.

Enhanced Normal Shooting
-Press and hold the Weapon Action button during the effects of Style Purge or while a non-elemental Gunblade is equipped to unleash a rapid-fire attack with the gun which quickly depletes your Focus Gauge and PP in turn.

動的に選択して発動します。

スマートＰＡで戦闘を行っている場合も

ラスターのアクションに慣れていなかったり

Artes de Photons inteligentes

The Luster Gunblade has Smart Photon Arts which can be activated with simple inputs.

Smart Photon Arts will automatically be chosen depending on conditions
like the enemy's distance and Photon Arts combos.

Skill effects and potency will function as usual even when using Smart Photon Arts
in battle. Smart Photon Arts are recommended for those who are still getting used
to controlling their Luster or for those who have trouble forming combos.
